task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser 'about:config' page showing the preference 'permissions.default.image' with its value set to '2'.
Look for the Tor Browser 'about:config' page showing the preference 'browser.display.use_document_fonts' with its value set to '0'.
Look for the Tor Browser 'about:config' page showing the preference 'media.autoplay.default' with its value set to '5'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Wikipedia Main Page and verify low-bandwidth appearance
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Tor Browser navigated to 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page'. The page should visually reflect the low-bandwidth settings (e.g., missing images, basic system fonts instead of custom web fonts).

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the Wikipedia page to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file manager, or terminal command confirming that a screenshot of the browser was saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/low_bandwidth_test.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Tor Browser GUI to change settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Settings should be changed via the 'about:config' interface in the browser, not by editing a prefs.js file in a text editor or using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually loaded the Wikipedia page in the browser
integrity.visual_evidence: The Wikipedia page must be rendered inside the Tor Browser window, not downloaded via curl/wget or viewed in a local HTML viewer.

integrity.description: The screenshot was genuinely captured and saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use a screenshot tool (system or browser-based) to capture the screen, rather than downloading an existing image or faking the file creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires setting Tor Browser preferences in about:config: `permissions.default.image` to 2, `browser.display.use_document_fonts` to 0, and `media.autoplay.default` to 5. The agent must visit `en.wikipedia.org` and save a screenshot exactly at `/home/ga/Documents/low_bandwidth_test.png`.
